@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After computing EMA values in execute_python, the agent sorted the results and then returned only a top-15 subset (including extraneous Y-codes) instead of the complete set of CPC level-4 groups and their best years, as shown by the truncated list in the final return_answer, causing mismatches with the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent identified German patents by a naive is_germany check on Patents_info (matching 'Germany' or 'DE-'), which included non-German records and thus computed EMAs on the wrong dataset, leading to incorrect CPC groups and best years.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After computing EMAs on DE patents granted in 2019, the agent’s execute_python step (var_function-call-16716686706558497772) arbitrarily truncated results to the top 10 and then only reported 5 CPC groups (identified via var_function-call-7495091114811341073), stopping early instead of returning the full set of level-4 CPC groups with their best years as required.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After computing many CPC groups and their best years (see execute_python var_function-call-16284034802144136550), the agent returned only a narrative “top 5” (return_answer) instead of providing the complete set of level-4 CPC groups with best years as requested, adding an unjustified top-N constraint and stopping early.
